prompt: Create an image of a character's vehicle that matches the features, belongings, and settings of the attached character. The vehicle should be flashy and wild, but it must absolutely not compromise the character's worldview or characteristics. Clearly state the name of the vehicle in very cool lettering on the image. Also, clearly state other features, purposes, etc. Prohibited: Names of organizations of real companies, names of countries, organizations, or characters related to the settings of existing works.
